rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §29.054, which governs bilingual education program exceptions. No statutory conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 29.054. EXCEPTION. (a) If a program other than bilingual education must be used in kindergarten through the elementary grades, documentation for the exception must be filed with and approved by the agency.
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns bilingual education exceptions and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
